channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US and Iran Escalate Conflict with Continued Nightly Strikes and Regional Tensions
item.description: The article details the ongoing military conflict between the United States and Iran, with the US launching its 11th consecutive night of airstrikes targeting Iranian military infrastructure. These st...

item.title: Mississauga: A Model of Multicultural Harmony and Urban Excellence
item.description: The article explores Mississauga, a city in Ontario, Canada, highlighting its role as a multicultural hub and economic powerhouse. It emphasizes the city's unique blend of diverse cultures, efficient ...

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays dominate Toronto Blue Jays with 12-2 victory and 21 hits
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays delivered a commanding performance against the Toronto Blue Jays, defeating them 12-2 in a game marked by an impressive 21-hit offensive display. Nick Fortes and Yandy Díaz each hit...

item.title: A Response to 'How Did Sheriff Happen to Delta?'
item.description: The article critiques a previous piece that questioned Governor Sheriff Oborevwori's rise to power in Delta State. The author argues that satire shouldn't replace factual evidence in political analysi...

item.title: Students nationwide demand better education infrastructure and resources amid protests
item.description: Students across India have launched widespread protests demanding significant improvements in education infrastructure and resource allocation. The demonstrations, linked to the hunger strike led by e...

item.title: Marcoleta Pleads Not Guilty in Plunder and Gift Receipt Cases
item.description: Senator Marcoleta has entered a not guilty plea in connection with plunder and gift receipt cases, marking a significant development in the ongoing legal proceedings. The plea was submitted during an ...

item.title: New Zealand Launches Emergency Vaccination Program to Protect Endangered Native Birds From H5N1 Bird Flu
item.description: New Zealand has begun an emergency effort to protect some of its most endangered native bird species after the highly pathogenic H5N1 strain of avian influenza was detected in the country for the firs...

item.title: Kenyan Musician Justina Syokau Discovers Natural Beauty Through Skin Care Routine
item.description: Kenyan Akamba musician Justina Syokau has opened up about quitting skin bleaching products, revealing that the decision came after followers repeatedly told her she was looking noticeably older. In a ...

item.title: Understanding the roles and strategies in the Tour de France peloton
item.description: The Tour de France is one of the most physically demanding sporting events, with the peloton—the main group of riders—playing a central role. Riders are divided into specialized roles: sprinters targe...

item.title: EFF launches strategy to regain urban support through mayoral candidate announcements
item.description: The Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) party is set to unveil its mayoral candidates for strategically important municipalities as part of its campaign to reclaim urban support lost in the 2024 elections...

item.title: China accuses Philippines of violating 2024 agreement during Ayungin incident
item.description: Chinese Ambassador Jing Quan accused the Philippines of breaching a 2024 provisional agreement during a tense standoff at Ayungin Shoal, where Philippine Navy personnel allegedly conducted unauthorize...

item.title: NEET protest and political tensions as leaders detained and released

item.title: Deputy PM Ishaq Dar attends Asean Regional Forum ministerial meeting in Manila
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar arrived in Manila on Wednesday for the 33rd Asean Regional Forum (ARF) ministerial meeting, as reported by Pakistan's Foreign Office. The event bri...

item.title: Over 2,200 Dangerous Wild Animals Kept as Pets in Britain, Study Reveals
item.description: A study by Born Free has found that over 2,200 dangerous wild animals, including venomous snakes, big cats, and crocodiles, are legally kept as pets in Britain under the 50-year-old Dangerous Wild Ani...

item.title: Rescued Eagle Jackie in Critical Condition After Anemia and Inflammation
item.description: An eagle believed to be nest cam star Jackie, rescued from Big Bear Lake, is battling anemia and inflamed kidneys at the Ojai Raptor Center. Friends of Big Bear Valley confirmed her identity based on ...
